summary: Sen. Johnson leads a roundtable, "COVID-19: A Second Opinion," documenting 1.05 million adverse events and 22,000 deaths connected to the COVID-19 vaccines.
body: Sen. Johnson leads a roundtable entitled, "COVID-19: A Second Opinion." At the event, Sen. Johnson documents 1.05 million adverse events, and 22,000 deaths connected to the COVID-19 vaccines.[^fn-272]
